column29:
This story is to correct an issue Vanguard is having with receiving the batch file for any records that fail the real time sync process in the enrollment API: VGI_529Client_Feed/Request 

Update ENROLL_METHOD from ‘UE’ to 'U'

Need to coordinate with DW to accept U going forward.



NOTE: RT # 482816



In CAT, run this job to generate a file that Vanguard wants to review (communicate with DevOps).

* sendVG529ClientRequest.sh
 

For data warehouse, send a email to Karen Klopfer <[Karen.Klopfer@ascensus.com|mailto:Karen.Klopfer@ascensus.com]> with the details and cc Sri Mounica, Jose, Cameron and Valerie in case she needs some details.
column274:
18/Jul/24 1:39 PM;627942e1a20bd0006fd944c1;Technical Note: 

The POST endpoint will validate the enroll method (see {{EnrollMethodUtils}}), but will continue on with the enrollment unless there is an error with the username field (see {{EnrollmentValidationHandler.postRequest}}). 

Then when creating the enrollment object to save, the enroll method is being hard coded to “UE” (see {{BaseAccountService.prepareAccountFields}}).

column1: Vanguard enroll method changes and release to production
column29:
We’ve changed the validation and hard coded value for enroll method from “UE” to “U”.  Vanguard is currently testing that in CAT. 

Due to the release, we’ve reverted the change back to “UE” in main.  We’ll have to re-do the change to “U” and then release it to prod. 



# Re-do the “U” enroll method change
# Deploy to stage
# Test - confirm change
# After the release planning meeting (8/28), create a release branch
# Deploy to prod
# Test - confirm deployment



[https://confluence.ascensus.com/display/GSSD/2024-08-28+-+Vanguard+enroll+method|https://confluence.ascensus.com/display/GSSD/2024-08-28+-+Vanguard+enroll+method]

column29:

# Access the CSR application in stage5
# Start the MDD CSR enrollment process 
# Click on Submit button after entering the valid voucher code

Expected:

Account should get created successfully

Actual:

Application is throwing an error. Refer the attached screenshot.

column29:
Tasks:

# Code freeze 
## Start creating release branches and updating pom files
# Stage1 deployment 
## In the morning after freeze, finish making release branches and deploy
# Prod deployment
## Push the same branches that were tested in stage1

NOTE: The branching should be completed by the teams that worked on the changes, the coordinator make sure nothing is missed. 

More info: [https://confluence.ascensus.com/display/GSSD/Release+Preparation+for+Gitlab+Projects|https://confluence.ascensus.com/display/GSSD/Release+Preparation+for+Gitlab+Projects]
